free_text: Elastic and inelastic deuteron scattering on 12C in
the energy range from 60 to 90 MeV
The target was a 3.21 mg/cm2 self-supporting foil
operating in the usual dE-E mode using Si surface-
barrier counters as dE detectors, and Ge(Li) diodes of
the side-entry type, E-detectors. A typical dE
thickness was 400 mu-m; the Ge(Li) diodes had standard
